_comment: Harness configuration. All keys are optional; hooks use internal defaults when keys are absent. Edit this file only to override defaults for project-specific needs (e.g. branch name different from main/development, custom test path layout).
_testFilePatterns_note: Rust unit tests live inline inside source files via `#[cfg(test)] mod tests { ... }`, so no separate glob is needed for them. The `src-tauri/tests/**/*.rs` entry covers Cargo integration tests only.
